description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 37 hrs 22 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 6 mins per day. His activity was spread across 6 projects, with most time in Other (42%), Java (36%), and Markdown (14%). No public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories are listed in the data.
